analysis: Seven nights in a row above six and a half hours, with four of them clearing seven and a half — that's not luck, that's the stack working. Your best night was 8 July at nearly eight hours with the lowest wake time of the stretch, and your REM has been genuinely strong across the board, touching two hours on two separate nights. The one thing worth clocking is that deep sleep has been a little shy — mostly in the twenties and thirties of minutes, with 6 July's 53 minutes being the outlier that showed you what's possible. Awake time was choppier mid-stretch, especially 7 and 10 July, but you pulled it back — and honestly, seven consecutive tracked nights of this consistency is the kind of thing that makes the whole ritual feel less like discipline and more like something that's just yours now.
